common.languageSubtitle: Choose the language for menus and labels.

auth.welcomeBlurb: MacroKeep is free. Sign in with Google to sync your food log. For AI estimates, grab a free Gemini API key from Google and add it in Settings.
auth.sessionExpiredLead: Your session may have expired. Sign in with Google to continue.
auth.driveConsentBlurb: MacroKeep needs Google Drive to save your data. We only use MacroKeep's private app folder on Drive. We can't see your other files.
auth.couldntLoadDiaryDefault: We couldn't load your food log from Google Drive.

settings.pageSubtitle: Account, AI key, and daily macro targets.
settings.geminiBlurb: Add a key to estimate macros from photos or descriptions. It's stored with your MacroKeep data on Google Drive. Google offers a free tier for personal use; you only pay if you enable billing on that key's project in Google AI Studio.
settings.howToStep1: Open <1>Google AI Studio → API keys</1> and sign in with Google.
settings.howToStep2: Click <1>Create API key</1>. Choose an existing Cloud project or let Google create one.
settings.howToStep3: Copy the new key (it starts with <1>AIza</1>) and paste it below.
settings.signedInAsUnknownAria: Signed in to an unknown account
settings.driveAppDataSubtitle: Files in your app data folder
settings.deleteAllCloudBlurb: This permanently deletes every MacroKeep file in this account's Drive app data folder. It can't be undone. Type <1>DELETE</1> to enable the button.
settings.advancedTapHint_one: {{count}} more tap to show advanced Drive options.
settings.advancedTapHint_other: {{count}} more taps to show advanced Drive options.

feedback.title: Feedback & support
feedback.blurb: Report bugs, suggest features, or send general feedback by email.
feedback.bugBody:

Steps to reproduce:

install.title: Install MacroKeep
install.blurb: Add MacroKeep to your home screen for quick access and a full-screen experience.
install.iosStep1: In Safari, tap the <1>menu</1> (⋯) in the bottom-right corner.
install.iosStep3: Tap <1>More</1> (⋯) or scroll down the sheet.
install.iosStep6: Open MacroKeep from your home screen.
install.androidStep1: In Chrome, tap the <1>menu</1> (⋮) in the top-right corner.
install.androidStep2: Tap <1>Install app</1> or <2>Add to Home screen</2>.
install.androidStep4: Open MacroKeep from your home screen.

dashboard.geminiKeyCardBlurb: Required for photo meal scanning. Add it in Settings. It's saved with your Drive food log.
dashboard.geminiKeyCardBlurbConnected: Used for photo meal scanning. Saved with your Drive food log.
dashboard.addApiKeyInSettings: Add your API key in Settings

history.pageSubtitle: Past meals by day, with daily macro totals.

meals.duplicateSavedTooltip: You already have a saved meal with this name and macros.
meals.addFromSavedSubtitle: Pick a saved meal to log it quickly.
meals.couldntLoadSaved: Couldn't load saved meals. Check your connection or refresh the app.
meals.noSavedMealsBrowse: No saved meals yet. Manage saved meals to add one, or save a meal from its details screen.
meals.noSavedMealsManage: No saved meals yet. Use the button below to create your first one.
meals.manageSavedMealsSubtitle: Add, edit, remove, or reorder your meals and combos.
meals.addSavedMealSubtitle: Create a template you can log with one tap.
meals.editSavedMealSubtitle: Update the name, macros, or photo for this quick-add meal.
meals.savedMealNotFound: We couldn't find this saved meal.
meals.addComboSubtitle: Group saved meals or custom items into one quick-add entry.
meals.editComboSubtitle: Update the combo name, items, or photo.
meals.comboNeedsItems: Add at least one item to the combo.
meals.comboCollageHint: By default, the thumbnail combines photos from your items.
meals.comboNoItemsYet: No items yet. Add saved meals or standalone items below.
meals.noSavedMealsForCombo: No saved meals available. Create one first.
meals.archiveConfirmIntro: These items are still used in combos:
meals.archiveConfirmOutro: They'll be removed from your saved meals list but stay linked in those combos. You can still edit them from a combo. They'll be deleted permanently when no combo uses them.
meals.archivedSavedMealBanner: This item was removed from your saved meals but is still linked in {{count}} combo(s).
meals.restoreSavedMealBody: "{{foodName}}" matches a removed item still used in {{count}} combo(s). Add it back to your saved meals?
meals.addSavedMealToComboSubtitle: Tap a saved meal to add it to the combo. You can add the same item more than once.
meals.addInlineItemToComboSubtitle: Enter macros for an item that isn't in your saved meals list.
meals.comboDraftExpired: Your combo draft expired. Go back and try again.

addMeal.pageSubtitle: Snap a photo, describe what you ate, enter macros yourself, or reuse something you've saved or logged before.
addMeal.describeSubtitle: Write what you had in plain language. A photo helps the estimate.
addMeal.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Big salad with grilled chicken, feta, and vinaigrette
addMeal.manualSubtitle: Enter macros and optionally attach a photo.
addMeal.addFromHistorySubtitle: Pick a past meal to log it again.
addMeal.couldntLoadHistory: Couldn't load history. Check your connection or refresh the app.
addMeal.nothingLoggedAddFirst: Nothing logged yet. Log a meal first, then you can reuse it here.
addMeal.estimatingSubtitle: This usually takes a few seconds.
addMeal.missingGeminiKey: AI estimates need a Gemini API key. Add one in Settings.
addMeal.describeBeforeEstimate: Describe what you ate before estimating.

progress.pageSubtitle: See how your macros trend and track progress photos.
progress.chartAria: Past week: daily intake vs. macro targets.
progress.bodyProgressBlurb: Snap photos to track how your body changes over time.
progress.couldntLoadPhotos: Couldn't load progress photos. Try again in a bit.
progress.noPhotosYet: No photos yet. Take your first check-in.
progress.captureSyncedBlurb: Saved to Google Drive (private app folder, same account as your meals).
progress.cameraUnavailable: Camera unavailable. Allow camera access in your browser settings, then reload.
progress.deleteProgressPhotoConfirm: Delete this progress photo from this device? This can't be undone.
progress.photoNotFound: We couldn't find this photo. It may have been deleted or the link is out of date.
progress.couldntOpenPhoto: Couldn't open this photo. Check the notification for details.
progress.slideshowNeedTwo: Add at least two progress photos to play a slideshow over time.

tutorial.pageSubtitle: Enter your profile, get suggested macros, then save them as your daily targets.
tutorial.activityVeryActive: Very active (hard training or physical job)

drive.pageSubtitle: Files MacroKeep stores in your Google Drive app data folder (hidden from My Drive).
drive.connectDriveToList: Sign in with Drive access to list app data files.
drive.invalidJson: Invalid JSON. Fix the syntax before saving.
drive.jsonTooLarge: This file is over {{mb}} MB. In-app preview is disabled to keep things responsive.
drive.imageTooLarge: This image is over {{mb}} MB. In-app preview is disabled to keep things responsive.

errors.couldNotLoadSavedMealsDrive: Couldn't load saved meals from Drive.
errors.allDriveDataDeletedDesc: Your food log will reload empty.
errors.signInForPhoto: Sign in with Google Drive access to attach a meal photo.
errors.duplicateSavedMeal: You already have a saved meal with this name and macros.
errors.alreadyInSavedMeals: This meal is already in your saved meals.
errors.cannotSaveComboLogToSavedMeals: Combo logs can't be added to saved meals. Edit the combo instead.
errors.savedMealsListChanged: Your saved meals list changed. Try again.
errors.comboHasNoItems: This combo has no items to log.
errors.notSignedInDrive: Not signed in or Drive access unavailable
